description_long: This is a well-worn, standard-sized basketball with a textured orange surface and multiple areas of visible abrasion and scuffing, revealing a grayish underlayer beneath the outer rubber or synthetic leather. The ball features the classic eight-panel design, with deep black seams running symmetrically around its circumference. The surface is covered in small, raised pebbles for grip, but many sections show significant wear, especially on one side where the orange coating has been almost completely abraded away. No visible brand logos or markings are present, giving the ball a generic appearance. The overall look suggests extensive use in outdoor urban environments, such as playgrounds or street courts.
description: A heavily worn orange basketball with gray scuff marks, deep black seams, and a classic eight-panel design. The surface is textured but shows significant abrasion and no visible branding.
description_view_0: This view highlights the most heavily worn area, with large patches of the orange surface missing and gray underlayer exposed, especially on the right side.
description_view_1: This side shows less wear, with mostly intact orange surface and only minor scuffing along the seams.
description_view_2: Moderate wear is visible here, with several scuffed patches and exposed gray areas, but more orange surface remains compared to view 0.
description_view_3: This view displays a large, relatively intact orange area with some scuffing along the seams and a few worn spots, but less severe than view 0.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with deep black seams, standard basketball arrangement.
attribute_visible_wear_or_graffiti: Extensive visible wear with large gray scuff marks and abraded areas, especially prominent in view 0.
